payload.answer: Conflict detected: existing memory says Sara is your daughter, while new input says Sara is your niece. Do not overwrite durable memory. Request clarification or create a separate entity only if the user confirms these are different people.

entity_resolution.reason: The new input refers to 'Sara' with a relationship that directly conflicts with an existing durable fact. Without disambiguating evidence, it is unclear whether this is the same Sara or a different person with the same name.

details: Detected a direct contradiction in familial relationship.
Chose not to commit new durable memory.

repair_options: Ask whether this is the same Sara or a different Sara.
If different, create a new entity for Sara with distinguishing context.
If the original memory was wrong, explicitly correct the relationship before updating durable memory.
